title: heliophila capensis
intro: Heliophila capensis, also known as African daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heliophila capensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antibacterial agent. Heliophila capensis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and useful plant in traditional medicine.
